games.name: Retro Pac-Man
games.description: Classic Pac-Man with emoji sprites! Eat pellets, avoid ghosts, and rack up points in this retro arcade game.

games.name: Arkanoid
games.description: Break all the bricks with the paddle and ball in this classic! Responsive and playable on desktop and mobile.

games.name: Bomberman
games.description: Classic Bomberman! Place bombs, destroy blocks, defeat enemies, and find the exit. Keyboard and mobile touch controls.

games.name: Tetris
games.description: Stack falling tetrominoes, clear lines, and chase a high score in this retro neon puzzle classic.

games.name: Copilot Bird
games.description: Flappy Bird meets GitHub Copilot! Navigate the code pipes without crashing. Tap or press Space to flap.

games.name: Head Ball
games.description: A one-on-one soccer game with Lamborghini cars! Score goals, unlock power-ups, and enjoy confetti celebrations.
